breaking.title: Venezuela earthquake updates on June 25, 2026: International aid heads to Venezuela after deadly earthquake
breaking.summary: The powerful back-to-back earthquakes killed at least 164 people and injured at least 971, Venezuela's Acting President Delcy Rodríguez said, as communities across the South American country sustained damage

breaking.title: UN agency says it pauses Hormuz ship evacuation initiative after vessel attacked
breaking.summary: The head of the International Maritime Organization said the plan to move stranded ships out of the Persian Gulf through the strait will be on hold until the agency can confirm safety guarantees for the ships on the evacuation listt

breaking.title: Many Injured In Explosion In Tripura, Bomb, Fire Squad At Spot: Cops
breaking.summary: Preliminary reports indicate that the blast occurred on the first floor of the apartment building.

breaking.title: Factbox: Latin America's 10 Deadliest Earthquakes
breaking.summary: Until now, the deadliest quake in Venezuela's modern history was a 1967 event that left 240 people dead.

breaking.title: In Telangana, the right to walk derailed by design
breaking.summary: The Supreme Court declared the ‘right to walk on demarcated footpaths’ a fundamental right. In Hyderabad, however, decades of vehicle-centric road planning have left pedestrians at a dead end. Swathi Vadlamudi takes a closer look at the state of the city’s footpaths and the challenges of making the right a reality

breaking.title: Hezbollah Says Israel Killed 3 Civilians In Lebanon Amid US-Iran Talks
breaking.summary: Hezbollah said it was the third "flagrant violation" by Israel "of the ceasefire.

breaking.title: What we know so far
breaking.summary: The two quakes have killed at least 188 people and injured nearly 1,500, with more feared trapped under rubble.

breaking.title: Stock Market Holiday 2026: Is BSE, NSE open or closed today for Muharram?
breaking.summary: Indian stock markets, including BSE and NSE, are closed today, June 26, for Muharram. The MCX has a partial closure, while NCDEX is shut all day. This holiday marks the start of the Islamic New Year and is a significant observance. Investors can anticipate several more market holidays throughout the year, with the next closure on September 14 for Ganesh Chaturthi.
